description: OCR: PNG image extraction with OCR enabled. In WASM this exercises the Uint8Array bridge parameter and Promise await in the generated OcrBackend bridge.

skip.reason: WASM bundle imports env.system/mkstemp + full WASI from the tesseract-wasm C runtime; instantiation succeeds with shimmed imports but actual OCR requires the host-side tesseract-wasm package wired through the JS glue.
